response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in web technologies, distributed systems (using Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang), and software craftsmanship. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, having only around 7 months of professional C++ experience listed. Furthermore, his infrastructure experience leans heavily toward high-level web microservices rather than the low-level cloud compute, network, and hardware architecture required for this specific technical leadership role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and testing frameworks.
Demonstrated ability to build and scale distributed systems and microservices handling high traffic.
Proven track record of mentoring engineers, organizing technical workshops, and driving engineering best practices.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, with less than one year of professional C++ experience listed.
Infrastructure background is heavily skewed towards web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than core cloud compute and hardware architecture.
Lacks explicit experience as a Technical Lead managing cross-team alignment for large-scale internal infrastructure platforms.
